code:
stateDiagram
  direction LR
  [*] --> Queued:Workflow Submitted
  Queued --> Running:Started First Step
  Queued --> Failed:Problem starting First Step
  Running --> InProgress:Succeeded Non-Terminal Step
  InProgress --> Running:Started Next Step
  Queued --> Cancelled:Cancelled by User
  Running --> Cancelled:Cancelled by User
  Running --> Completed:Succeeded Final Step
  Paused --> Running:Resumed by User
  Running --> Paused:Paused by User
  InProgress --> Paused:Paused by User
  InProgress --> Cancelled:Cancelled by User
  Failed --> InProgress:Retrying Step
  Failed --> Queued:Resubmitted by User
  Cancelled --> InProgress:Retrying Step
  Cancelled --> Queued:Resubmitted by User
  Completed --> Queued:Resubmitted by User
  Queued --> Paused:Paused by User
  Paused --> Queued:Resumed by User

  Queued:queued
  Running:running
  Failed:failed
  InProgress:in_progress
  Cancelled:cancelled
  Completed:completed
  Paused:paused

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个工作流引擎的状态图。核心状态包括：Queued（等待队列）、Running（正在运行）、InProgress（步骤执行中）、Failed（失败）、Cancelled（用户取消）、Completed（完成）、Paused（暂停）。方向用从左到右。
确认一下，Running和InProgress的区别是什么？听起来有点像，我需要知道怎么画转换关系。
Running是引擎层面在跑，InProgress是具体某个步骤在执行中。关键转换是：Running收到"Succeeded Non-Terminal Step"会进入InProgress，然后InProgress收到"Started Next Step"再回到Running。
好的，我先把主线画出来：从初始状态到Queued，Queued通过"Workflow Submitted"进入，然后Queued可以Started First Step到Running，Running到InProgress，InProgress再回到Running形成循环。
还要加上失败路径：Queued启动第一步失败时要到Failed状态。另外Failed可以Retrying Step回到InProgress，或者用户Resubmitted回到Queued。
加上了。现在处理用户取消：Queued、Running、InProgress都应该能Cancelled by User到Cancelled状态。
对，而且Cancelled也能Retrying Step到InProgress，或者Resubmitted by User回到Queued。Completed完成后也可以Resubmitted重新开始。
暂停逻辑我也补一下：Running和InProgress都能Paused by User到Paused，Paused可以Resumed回到Running或Queued。另外Queued也能直接暂停，从Paused恢复时回到Queued。
最后Running通过"Succeeded Final Step"到达Completed，这就是终态了。所有状态标签用小写格式。
检查完毕：所有转换都覆盖了，包括正常流程、失败重试、用户取消、暂停恢复，以及完成后的重新提交。状态标签已统一为小写。
